category_sources: source_facts.description says it imports files in MS Works format.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides libwps and source_facts.homepage is the official libwps site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official libwps project site; the SourceForge project wiki is the official wiki documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage identifies the official SourceForge project, whose code browser is the official source-control surface.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies MS Works import; source_facts.executables lists wks2csv, wps2html, and related converters.
